ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEFENDANT CENTRAL STRIPING SERVICE, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES HEARING SET FOR SEP-27-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING: ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING RE: DEFENDANT CENTRAL STRIPING SERVICE, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO ADMISSION/INTERROGATORIES. THE COURT ADOPTS THE RECOMMENDATION OF JUDGE PRO TEM PAUL RENNE AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CENTRAL STRIPPING SERVICES' MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER RESPONSES TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION 5, 6, 7, 8 & 10 IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO SERVE NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 4, 2012 HIS RESPONSE TO REQUESTS FOR ADMISSION 5, 6, 7, 8, & 10. IF A RESPONSE TO ANY SUCH REQUEST IS ANYTHING OTHER THAN AN UNQUALIFIED ADMISSION, PLAINTIFF WILL PROVIDE WITH SPECIFICITY THE INFORMATION REQUIRED BY FORM INTERROGATORY NO. 17.1 AS TO SUCH REQUEST. PLAINTIFF'S INITIAL RESPONSES TO THE FORM INTERROGATORIES WERE NOT TIMELY, THUS ALL OBJECTIONS ARE WAIVED. PLAINTIFF AND HIS COUNSEL WILL PAY TO DEFENDANT CENTRAL STRIPPING SERVICES SANCTIONS IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 2,500.00. THE COURT ADDS A DUE DATE OF OCTOBER 12, 2012 FOR PAYMENT. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

RULING - A R G U E D; Defendant Central Striping Service, Incorporated's Motion For Summary Judgment/Motion For Summary Adjudication- The motion for summary judgment is granted. Defendant Central Striping Service, Inc.'S Motion To Compel Responses To Admission/Interrogatories
Off Calendar Sep-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: JOSEPH OLIN, ESQ., LAW OFFICES OF BRIAN LARSEN, 415.398.5000, FOR PLAINTIFF KELLY HOULIHAN.
MARK DIVELBISS, ESQ., FOTOUHI EPPS HILLGER GILROY MAU, 415.362.9300, FOR DEFENDANT CENTRAL STRIPING SERVICE.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling RE: Defendant Central Striping Service, Inc.'S Motion To Compel Responses To Admission/Interrogatories. The court adopts the recommendation of Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne as follows: Defendant Central Stripping Services' Motion to Compel Further Responses to Requests for Admission 5, 6, 7, 8 & 10 is granted. Plaintiff is ordered to serve no later than October 4, 2012 his response to Requests for Admission 5, 6, 7, 8, & 10. If a response to any such Request is anything other than an unqualified admission, Plaintiff will provide with specificity the information required by Form Interrogatory no. 17.1 as to such request. Plaintiff's initial responses to the form interrogatories were not timely, thus all objections are waived. Plaintiff and his counsel will pay to Defendant Central Stripping Services sanctions in the amount of $ 2,500.00. The court adds a due date of October 12, 2012 for payment. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
